metadata.description: Multi-agent trading research workflow for Claude Code — port of TauricResearch/TradingAgents extended with virattt/ai-hedge-fund persona pattern.

plugins.name: tradingagents
plugins.description: Substanz Edition v2.1 — 4 analysts + 13 famous-investor personas + bull/bear debate + trader + risk manager. 41 MCP tools: DCF/Kelly/ATR/Sharpe + v2.1 layers (FRED macro, congress trades, 13F holdings, options flow, Finnhub analyst recs/earnings calendar, FMP earnings transcripts, PRAW Reddit, FinBERT sentiment, vectorbt backtests, empyrical risk metrics, mlfinlab labels). Includes backtester + read-only Next.js dashboard.
